series_metadata.series_description: Record includes correspondence related to any person who is driving a motor vehicle while under the influence of an alcohol and/or controlled substance (D.U.I.) and is arrested by a police officer. They will be requested, under Section 4511.191 of the Ohio Revised Code, to submit to a chemical test to determine the alcohol and/or drug content in his/her system. If the person refuses, a BMV 2255 form is completed by Law Enforcement and forwarded to the ALS Unit for processing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Hard copies are destroyed after they are imaged. ; Electronic: Effective December 2001, all ALS suspension cases are stored on the Optic Image System for at least 50 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
